mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log ( log_type, module, operation, operator_id, operator_name, request_method, request_url, request_params, ip_address, user_agent, response_status, error_msg, execute_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{logType}, #{module}, #{operation}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParams}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{responseStatus}, #{errorMsg}, #{executeTime}, NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM operation_log WHERE create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM operation_log WHERE log_type = #{logType}
